name: Windows Temp Files
description: Temporary files created by Windows and applications.
impact: Files in use will be skipped; completely safe to delete.

name: Windows Delivery Optimization
description: Cache for Windows updates shared across local network.
impact: Windows update downloads might take slightly longer next time.

name: Crash Dumps (WER)
description: Logs and memory dumps created when applications crash.
impact: You will lose the ability to debug past app crashes. Completely safe to delete.

name: Windows Update Downloads
description: Downloaded files for pending Windows Updates.
impact: Only delete if Windows is fully up-to-date. Deleting this while an update is installing will break the update.
